title: scripts/retro.py — weekly retrospective generator
what_failed: No automated weekly summary of activity (tickets shipped, cost, errors, top tools). Ash had to inspect logs/SOLUTIONS manually to know how a week went.
suggested_fix: Script that pulls last 7 days from tickets/closed/, SOLUTIONS.jsonl, logs/turns.jsonl, logs/evolution.jsonl, and git log; aggregates by-mode turn counts, total cost, error rate, top tools; renders to vault/notes/retros/YYYY-Www.md. Optional --notify sends summary to Telegram. --stdout for quick check.
fix_applied: Wrote scripts/retro.py with parse_week (handles 'YYYY-Www' or current week default), 5 collectors (closed_tickets/solutions/turns/evolution/commits — all skip blank/malformed JSONL lines), summarise (aggregates), render_retro (markdown), and telegram_notify. Hooks into existing tools.tools_telegram.send_message for --notify.
tests: Covered by testing/test_plan_sprint_and_retro.py — 9 retro tests covering parse_week, all 5 range collectors, summarise, render_retro, and stdout mode.
